name: 박준혁

appearance_en.face_shape: slim oval face, slightly angular jaw, soft cheekbones, overall gentle bone structure worn by time
appearance_en.skin: fair-medium Korean skin tone, chronic indoor pallor, grey fatigue undertone, slightly uneven texture at nasolabial folds, pores visible at close range
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, very dark brown iris nearly black, outer corners drooping with accumulated tiredness, reddish whites especially after drinking, tendency to avoid direct eye contact
appearance_en.nose: medium bridge, slightly broad rounded tip, natural — disappears into the face unremarkably
appearance_en.mouth: thin upper lip, slightly fuller lower lip, resting position pressed closed, corners marginally downturned, smile reaches eyes only with effort
appearance_en.eyebrows: medium-thick dark straight brows, perpetual shallow furrow between them even when relaxed — a decade of suppressed worry etched in
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: pronounced dark circles casting actual shadow under eyes, single deep vertical crease between brows, no moles or scars, left temple vein faintly visible when stressed
appearance_en.hair: short fine black hair, neat left-of-center side part, imperceptibly thinning at temples, a few strands fall across forehead by late afternoon

body.proportions: average lean frame, narrower shoulders than height suggests, no visible muscle, slight softening at midsection from sedentary lifestyle
body.posture: chronic forward head position, shoulders internally rotated and dropped — years of desk work and suppressed anxiety in physical form
body.body_prompt: 178cm lean average-frame Korean man, narrow shoulders rolled inward, forward head posture, subtle physical defeat without being dramatic

default.description: grey or slate dress shirt slightly wrinkled, dark charcoal trousers with faint crease, tie loosened knot pulled down, collar button open, no jacket
default.wardrobe_prompt: grey slate dress shirt slightly wrinkled, dark charcoal trousers, tie loosened knot pulled down, collar button undone, no jacket

casual.description: plain white or beige cotton tee, dark straight-leg jeans, simple canvas sneakers, no accessories
casual.wardrobe_prompt: plain white or beige cotton t-shirt, dark straight-leg jeans, simple white canvas sneakers, no accessories

stressed.description: same shirt visibly creased and untucked at back, tie fully removed, stubble 2–3 days, slightly glassy eyes
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same grey dress shirt visibly creased untucked, tie removed, 2-3 days stubble showing

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: resting face carries a faint trace of suppressed worry — not obviously sad, just the face of someone who stopped expecting things to get better
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: slim oval-faced Korean man early-to-mid 50s, pronounced dark circles casting shadow under eyes, medium-thick dark brows with permanent slight furrow, drooping outer eye corners, short neat black hair side part, 178cm lean narrow-shouldered with forward head posture, fair-medium pallid Korean skin, quiet exhaustion in every detail

style_prompt: photorealistic, ordinary Korean man you would pass on the street, no beauty filter, no skin retouching, visible pores and natural skin texture, realistic fatigue and aging, 50mm f1.8 lens, cool-toned office ambient light, street-cast everyday appearance, cinematic restraint
negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, painting, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra fingers, extra limbs, muscular, tan skin, smiling, happy expression, glamorous, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, perfect complexion, smooth flawless skin, model look, idol look, celebrity appearance, skin retouching
